human_control.reason: This blueprint is a low-risk runtime or simulation pattern that only writes local decision-support artifacts.

inputs.description: Default synthetic inputs bundled with the blueprint.

artifacts.description: Stable run-store files and domain-specific outputs.

human.description: Sparse human collaboration notices, input requests, and responses.

input_skills.description: Connector-backed or reusable skill-backed input sources.

inputs.description: Resolved runtime inputs and adapter provenance.

logs.description: Runtime stdout/stderr and explicit log artifacts.

output_skills.description: Optional fan-out destinations after local run-store writes.

outputs.description: Primary result and final user-facing artifact.

resources.description: Blueprint-scoped CPU, GPU, memory, and LLM token usage samples.

streams.description: Named data or event streams exposed by the blueprint.

metadata.customizable_for: Batch analytics, Monte Carlo jobs, large enrichment queues.
metadata.name: Demo: Parallel Worker Benchmark
metadata.problem_solved: Agent systems need to prove they can dispatch many bounded tasks and collect results reliably before being trusted with larger workloads.
metadata.target_users: Platform teams testing scheduler throughput, worker pools, and aggregation behavior.

outputs.artifact_contract: Scale summary and worker completion metrics.

inline_json.description: Load overrides from an inline JSON object.

input_file.description: Load JSON overrides from a local file path.
